promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not treat this closure audit as active A2 control memory or as proof that the deep-archive run lane is globally complete; it is only a bounded routing surface for the next re-entry choice.

selection_basis.queue_reason: Selected because the deep-archive RUN_SIGNAL lane is now fully childed across the raw 0002-0005 sequence plus the 0005 bundle sibling, so the next step must be a residual audit rather than another signal-family reduction.
selection_basis.parent_reason: The five completed signal children provide the current closure anchors for the lane and prove that signal is no longer the strongest unresolved deep-archive family.
selection_basis.comparison_anchor_reason: The remaining deep-archive test families were checked from the live ledger, and TEST_A1_PACKET_ZIP was chosen because it remains unchilded while already having a close sibling child in TEST_A1_PACKET_EMPTY and a tighter packet-identity contradiction packet than the broader remaining families.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Deferred because it is broader and more layered than TEST_A1_PACKET_ZIP, while the packet-zip sibling seam is tighter and already has a direct comparison child.
Deferred because it remains useful but is a thinner external-handoff shell than the stronger packet-identity contradiction packet preserved in TEST_A1_PACKET_ZIP.
Deferred because it would reopen a broader chain-oriented family before the tighter packet-zip sibling seam is reduced.

raw_source_reread_reason: The needed work here was lane-state audit and next-family nomination, not raw-source recovery. The live ledger, the completed signal children, and the unresolved test-family batch artifacts were sufficient to determine the next bounded target.

candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the routing rule that another signal-family reduction is no longer the strongest next move once the lane is child-complete.

candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the narrowed residual set after signal closure and prevents further routing drift inside already-covered run families.

quarantined_items.name: CLOSURE_AUDIT_AS_ACTIVE_A2_CONTROL_MEMORY
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: This batch is only a bounded A2-mid routing surface and must not be promoted into active A2 control law.

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates isolate the lane-state facts that matter now: the deep-archive RUN_SIGNAL lane is direct-child closed, another signal re-entry is no longer the strongest next move, the residual pool now sits in compact test families, and TEST_A1_PACKET_ZIP is the strongest next bounded target because it combines sibling-anchor support with a tight packet-identity contradiction seam.
They remain routing-only, contradiction-preserving, and explicitly below active A2 authority.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: These items remain stale lane momentum, overclosure, sibling-overclosure, or active-control inflation rather than clean routing packets.
The audit is useful for selection, but not promotable as active law.
